en: And he said to his disciples, "Temptations to sin are sure to come, but woe to the one through whom they come!
zh: 耶穌又對門徒說：“使人犯罪的事是免不了的，但那使人犯罪的人有禍了！

en: It would be better for him if a millstone were hung around his neck and he were cast into the sea than that he should cause one of these little ones to sin.
zh: 就算拿一塊大磨石拴在他的頸項上，把他沉在深海裡，比他使這小子中的一個犯罪還好。

en: Pay attention to yourselves! If your brother sins, rebuke him, and if he repents, forgive him,
zh: 你們應當謹慎。如果你弟兄得罪你，就勸戒他；他若懊悔，就饒恕他。

en: and if he sins against you seven times in the day, and turns to you seven times, saying, 'I repent,' you must forgive him."
zh: 如果他一天七次得罪你，又七次回轉，對你說：‘我懊悔了！’你總要饒恕他。”

en: The apostles said to the Lord, "Increase our faith!"
zh: 使徒對主說：“請你加添我們的信心。”

en: And the Lord said, "If you had faith like a grain of mustard seed, you could say to this mulberry tree, 'Be uprooted and planted in the sea,' and it would obey you.
zh: 主說：“如果你們有信心像一粒芥菜種，就是對這棵桑樹說：‘拔起根來，栽到海裡去！’它也必聽從你們。

en: "Will any one of you who has a servant plowing or keeping sheep say to him when he has come in from the field, 'Come at once and sit down at table'?
zh: “你們中間誰有僕人去耕地或是放羊，從田裡回來，你就對他說：‘快過來坐下吃飯’；

en: Will he not rather say to him, 'Prepare supper for me, and dress properly, and serve me while I eat and drink, and afterward you will eat and drink'?
zh: 而不對他說：‘給我預備晚餐，束起腰來服事我，等我吃喝完了，你才吃喝’呢？

en: Does he thank the servant because he did what was commanded?
zh: 僕人作了所吩咐的事，主人還謝謝他嗎？

en: So you also, when you have done all that you were commanded, say, 'We are unworthy servants; we have only done what was our duty.'"
zh: 你們也是這樣，作完一切吩咐你們的事，應該說：‘我們是無用的僕人，我們只作了應分作的。’”

en: On the way to Jerusalem he was passing along between Samaria and Galilee.
zh: 耶穌往耶路撒冷去，經過撒瑪利亞和加利利的邊境。

en: And as he entered a village, he was met by ten lepers, who stood at a distance
zh: 他走進一個村莊，有十個痲風病人迎面而來，遠遠地站著，

en: and lifted up their voices, saying, "Jesus, Master, have mercy on us."
zh: 大聲說：“主耶穌啊，可憐我們吧！”

en: When he saw them he said to them, "Go and show yourselves to the priests." And as they went they were cleansed.
zh: 他看見了，就對他們說：“你們去給祭司檢查吧。”他們去的時候就潔淨了。

en: Then one of them, when he saw that he was healed, turned back, praising God with a loud voice;
zh: 內中有一個人見自己已經好了，就回來大聲頌讚 神，

en: and he fell on his face at Jesus' feet, giving him thanks. Now he was a Samaritan.
zh: 在耶穌腳前把臉伏在地上感謝他。他是一個撒瑪利亞人。

en: Then Jesus answered, "Were not ten cleansed? Where are the nine?
zh: 耶穌說：“潔淨了的不是有十個人嗎？那九個在哪裡？

en: Was no one found to return and give praise to God except this foreigner?"
zh: 除了這外族人，再沒有一個回來頌讚 神嗎？”

en: And he said to him, "Rise and go your way; your faith has made you well."
zh: 耶穌就對他說：“起來，走吧，你的信使你痊愈了。”

en: Being asked by the Pharisees when the kingdom of God would come, he answered them, "The kingdom of God is not coming with signs to be observed,
zh: 法利賽人問耶穌：“ 神的國甚麼時候來到呢？”他回答：“ 神的國來到，是眼睛看不見的。

en: nor will they say, 'Look, here it is!' or 'There!' for behold, the kingdom of God is in the midst of you."
zh: 人不能說：‘看哪！在這裡’，或說：‘在那裡’；因為 神的國就在你們裡面。”

en: And he said to the disciples, "The days are coming when you will desire to see one of the days of the Son of Man, and you will not see it.
zh: 他又對門徒說：“日子將到，你們渴望看見人子的一個日子，卻見不到。

en: And they will say to you, 'Look, there!' or 'Look, here!' Do not go out or follow them.
zh: 有人會對你們說：‘看哪，在那裡；看哪，在這裡！’你們不要出去，也不要追隨他們。

en: For as the lightning flashes and lights up the sky from one side to the other, so will the Son of Man be in his day.
zh: 電光怎樣從天這邊一閃，直照到天那邊，人子在他的日子也是這樣。

en: But first he must suffer many things and be rejected by this generation.
zh: 但他必須先受許多苦，被這個世代棄絕。

en: Just as it was in the days of Noah, so will it be in the days of the Son of Man.
zh: 挪亞的時代怎樣，人子的時代也是怎樣。

en: They were eating and drinking and marrying and being given in marriage, until the day when Noah entered the ark, and the flood came and destroyed them all.
zh: 當時人們吃喝嫁娶，直到挪亞進入方舟的那一天，洪水來了，把他們全都滅掉。

en: Likewise, just as it was in the days of Lot- they were eating and drinking, buying and selling, planting and building,
zh: 在羅得的時代也是這樣，人們吃喝買賣，耕種建造，

en: but on the day when Lot went out from Sodom, fire and sulfur rained from heaven and destroyed them all-
zh: 直到羅得離開所多瑪的那一天，火與硫磺從天上降下來，把他們全都滅掉。

en: so will it be on the day when the Son of Man is revealed.
zh: 人子顯現的日子也是這樣。

en: On that day, let the one who is on the housetop, with his goods in the house, not come down to take them away, and likewise let the one who is in the field not turn back.
zh: 當那日，人在房頂上，器具在屋裡，不要下來拿；在田裡的，照樣不要回家。

en: Remember Lot's wife.
zh: 應當記著羅得的妻子的教訓。

en: Whoever seeks to preserve his life will lose it, but whoever loses his life will keep it.
zh: 凡是想保全生命的，必喪掉生命；凡是犧牲生命的，卻必保全生命。

en: I tell you, in that night there will be two in one bed. One will be taken and the other left.
zh: 我告訴你們，當那夜，兩個人在一張床上，一個被接去，一個被撇下。

en: There will be two women grinding together. One will be taken and the other left."
zh: 兩個女人一起推磨，一個被接去，一個被撇下。”
門徒問耶穌：“主啊，這些事會在哪裡發生呢？”主說：“屍首在哪裡，鷹也會聚集在哪裡。”

en: And they said to him, "Where, Lord?" He said to them, "Where the corpse is, there the vultures will gather."
